timestamp.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of the MCP call

order_id.description: Shopify order GID or numeric ID; required even on no-op log lines

tool_name.description: Name of the MCP tool invoked (e.g., shopify.orders.get, gmail.send, shippo.rate)

error_message.description: Populated when result_status is failure or escalated

duration_ms.description: Wall-clock duration of the MCP call in milliseconds
